metadata.purpose: Red munition inventory and attributes for Taiwan bombardment campaign-analysis simulation.
metadata.scope_note: Open-source, campaign-level abstraction. Not a strike plan, no target sequencing, no aimpoints. Inventories are scenario defaults and should remain user-editable.
modeling_assumptions: category is one of Inorganic-Slow, Inorganic-Fast, or Organic.
warhead_size is one of large, medium, or small.
rounds_per_engagement_default represents a package/salvo, not necessarily one launcher load.
effects are modeled in munition_target_pairings.json conditional on target detection; detection is handled elsewhere.
Static targets bypass ISR detection and are always known/targetable if not destroyed.
Moveable and mobile targets require detection before attack.
This standalone IJFS calculator does not apply suppression effects; suppression may be handled elsewhere.
UAV and manned-aircraft strike/ISR availability is handled through ijfs_scenario.json mission pools.

dod_cmp_2024.title: Military and Security Developments Involving the People's Republic of China 2024
dod_cmp_2024.claim_supported: PLA Rocket Force missile classes, estimated inventories, ranges; PLAAF/PLAN aviation force structure; PLA joint firepower strike context.

cmsi_pch191_2023.title: China Maritime Report No. 32: The PCH191 Modular Long-Range Rocket Launcher
cmsi_pch191_2023.publisher: China Maritime Studies Institute, U.S. Naval War College
cmsi_pch191_2023.claim_supported: PCH191 has multiple long-range precision munition types and can support joint firepower strikes and landing operations against Taiwan.

target_inventory_2026.title: Taiwan Bombardment Target Inventory JSONs and Research Memo
target_inventory_2026.publisher: Deep research agent output supplied by simulation designer
target_inventory_2026.claim_supported: Target categories, target attributes, and target type templates.

metadata.inventory_accounting_rule: Always decrement inventory by rounds_per_engagement_default. No partial salvos. All inventory_default values are clean multiples of rounds_per_engagement_default.

munitions.name: PLA SRBM Strike Package (DF-15/DF-16 family)
munitions.inventory_notes: Clean multiple of 8. Scenario default for generic large SRBM packages after reserving DF-15C penetrators separately.
munitions.notes: Fast, preplanned or rapidly tasked missile package. Strong against fixed soft/hard targets; conservative destruction probabilities against mobile targets even conditional on detection.

munitions.name: DF-15C Penetrator SRBM
munitions.inventory_notes: User-specified default. Clean multiple of 10; reserved for buried/hardened targets.
poor_target_types: targets requiring persistent loitering or terminal visual identification
munitions.notes: Specialized abstraction for buried targets such as Heng Shan and Chiashan. Destruction of buried targets remains difficult; suppression is much more likely than destruction.

munitions.name: PCH191 BRE6 Close-Range Ballistic Rocket Package
munitions.inventory_notes: User-specified default. Clean multiple of 48; represents 600 battalion-sized 48-round fire missions.
munitions.notes: Modeled as a fast, massed, medium-warhead close-range precision rocket package. Useful for suppression and attrition of fixed or recently located targets.

munitions.name: PCH191 BRE8 Close-Range Ballistic Rocket Package
munitions.inventory_notes: Scenario knob. Clean multiple of 12; represents 600 heavy 12-round fire missions.
munitions.notes: Modeled as a heavier PCH191 package than BRE6. More destructive against hard/static targets; still conservative against mobile targets.

munitions.name: Land-Attack Cruise Missile Package (CJ-10 / DH-10 / CJ-100 family)
munitions.inventory_notes: Clean multiple of 4. Scenario default for land-attack cruise missile packages.
munitions.notes: Slow compared with ballistic missiles; strong against fixed targets if defenses are penetrated, but very poor against mobile targets unless the target remains static after detection.

munitions.name: YJ-62 Anti-Ship Cruise Missile Package
munitions.inventory_notes: Clean multiple of 4. Coastal-defense anti-ship cruise missiles.
best_target_types: naval targets at sea or in port
munitions.notes: Subsonic anti-ship cruise missile for coastal-defense strike role.

munitions.name: YJ-12 Anti-Ship Cruise Missile Package
munitions.inventory_notes: Clean multiple of 4. Coastal-defense anti-ship cruise missiles.
best_target_types: naval targets at sea or in port
munitions.notes: Supersonic anti-ship cruise missile for coastal-defense strike role.

munitions.name: CM-401 Anti-Ship Ballistic Missile Package
munitions.inventory_notes: Clean multiple of 4. Short-range anti-ship ballistic missile, PCH191-launched.
munitions.notes: Supersonic anti-ship ballistic missile with terminal maneuvering. Devastating against large combatants; less effective against small maneuvering craft.

munitions.name: One-Way Attack Drone Package
munitions.inventory_notes: Clean multiple of 12. Scenario default for mass one-way-attack drone packages.
munitions.notes: Useful as a low-cost suppression or saturation tool. Destruction probabilities are deliberately conservative, especially for hard or mobile targets.

munitions.name: Attack UAV Package
munitions.inventory_notes: Clean multiple of 2. Scenario default for attack UAV engagements; availability may also be constrained by UAV mission allocation.
best_target_types: SAM components after air defense degradation
munitions.notes: Organic sensor-shooter package that performs better than delayed munitions against active mobile targets, but air-defense losses are handled separately. Platform-backed (capacity from OrganicStrikeBudget); this inventory pool no longer depletes.

munitions.name: Attack Aircraft Precision Strike Package
munitions.inventory_notes: Clean multiple of 4. Scenario default for manned aircraft strike packages; availability may also be constrained by manned aircraft mission allocation.
best_target_types: fixed soft/hard targets after air defenses are degraded
poor_target_types: targets covered by intact air defenses
munitions.notes: Represents manned aircraft delivering guided munitions. Platform-backed: daily capacity is derived from surviving OOB manned strike-role squadrons (OrganicStrikeBudget), not from this inventory pool, which no longer depletes. Effects are conditional on reaching the target; air-defense attrition and air superiority are modeled elsewhere.
